sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Opinion | Why retailers could hold the key to mainstream stablecoin adoption
feed.summary: A T-shirt can travel from Guangzhou to Sydney in less than a week, yet the money to pay for it can take three. Logistics run at lightning speed while money still crawls through pipes built for another era. That mismatch isn't just inconvenient, it's a hidden tax on global trade.
